title: Euodia leguminosa
taxonomy: Euodia leguminosa is classified within the family Rutaceae, which includes citrus and rue plants. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics and its genetic relationships with other species. Euodia leguminosa belongs to the genus Euodia, which contains several species of flowering plants native to Asia. The genus Euodia is further grouped into the subfamily Aurantioideae, a subset of Rutaceae. This classification helps scientists understand the evolutionary history and relationships between different plant species.
uses: Euodia leptocephala, also known as Euodia, is a plant that has been used in traditional medicine for various purposes.
